caption: A man with a partially bald head is seated in a high-backed wooden chair against a background of vertical wooden paneling. He is wearing a cream-colored long-sleeved shirt paired with a beige Nehru vest, which features a white pocket square in the chest pocket. He is looking slightly to his left with a subtle smile on his face. In front of him is a table covered with a white cloth, and a thin black microphone stands on the table. Across the frames, the man remains in a nearly static position, maintaining his seated posture and expression while looking off-camera. The lighting is soft and consistent, and there are no visible logos, on-screen text, or changes in the environment as the scene progresses.
